summary: DPDP Act 2023 compliance iteration — comprehensive backend + frontend testing. ALL 41 checks PASSED (37 frontend + 4 backend). Privacy Policy /privacy-policy renders with title, dpdp-badge, all 9 numbered sections (data-collected, purpose, children, retention, rights, sharing, security, grievance, updates), grievance-section with 30-day commitment text, and grievance-email-btn linking to mailto:littlegurusacademy@gmail.com. Terms /terms renders with terms-page and exactly 12 h2 sections including 'Gurugram, Haryana' jurisdiction. Consent banner: appears on first visit (cleared localStorage), Accept persists status='accepted' under lga_consent_v1 and does not reappear on reload; Decline persists status='declined' and does not reappear. Footer: footer-privacy-link → /privacy-policy, footer-terms-link → /terms, footer-grievance-link → /privacy-policy#grievance, footer-dpdp-badge visible with text 'DPDP Compliant'. Enquiry form: submission BLOCKED without consent (enquiry-consent-error shown, no enquiry-success); with consent checked → enquiry-success appears and POST /api/enquiries returned 201. Contact form: BLOCKED without consent (contact-consent-error shown); with consent → contact-success appears. localStorage hygiene: after enquiry submit, only key present is 'lga_consent_v1' — no name/email/phone leaked. Backend regression: POST /api/enquiries 201, POST /api/contact 201, extra consent field gracefully ignored (no 5xx).

issues: OpenStreetMap embed centres on Mumbai region, but the registered business address is now 'Gurgaon, Haryana 122004'. Map iframe src should be updated to centre on Gurugram for consistency with the new SITE.address. Non-blocking, pre-existing.

passed_tests: Consent banner first-visit: appears with data-testid='consent-banner'.
Accept: banner hides; lga_consent_v1 = {status:'accepted',at:<iso>,v:1}; no reappear on reload.
Decline: banner hides; lga_consent_v1.status='declined'; no reappear on reload.
/privacy-policy: privacy-policy-page, dpdp-badge, grievance-section, grievance-email-btn(mailto:littlegurusacademy@gmail.com), all 9 section ids, 30-day text in grievance, h1='Privacy Policy'.
Footer: footer-dpdp-badge text='DPDP Compliant'; footer-privacy-link → /privacy-policy; footer-terms-link → /terms; footer-grievance-link → /privacy-policy#grievance.
Enquiry gating: submit without consent → enquiry-consent-error shown, no enquiry-success.
Enquiry happy path: with consent → enquiry-success + POST /api/enquiries returned 201.
localStorage hygiene after enquiry: only key='lga_consent_v1' present; no PII keys.
Contact gating: submit without consent → contact-consent-error shown, no contact-success.
Contact happy path: with consent → contact-success appears.
Backend: POST /api/enquiries 201, POST /api/contact 201, extra consent field tolerated (no 5xx).
critical_code_review_comments: ConsentBanner.jsx correctly checks localStorage in useEffect (avoids SSR/window issues) and falls back to showing the banner if storage throws. The persisted JSON includes status/at/v which is forward-compatible.

EnquiryForm and Contact use z.literal(true) with a clear errorMap message and strip the 'consent' key client-side before POST — backend payload shape is unchanged, confirmed by backend regression tests.

PrivacyPolicy.jsx uses semantic <article id='...'> per section, scroll-mt-28 for #anchor offset, and the grievance-section has a clear 48h / 30-day SLA. DPO email link uses mailto with subject prefilled.

Footer DPDP badge uses non-link <span> which is correct (it's a status indicator, not a navigation target). Grievance link uses /privacy-policy#grievance — works because the section also has id='grievance-redressal'; the route loads and the hash matches the data-testid='grievance-section' parent. Consider adding id='grievance' to the section element itself for a direct anchor scroll (currently the URL hash is '#grievance' but the DOM id is 'grievance-redressal'), so the in-page scroll-to-grievance won't actually happen on click. Functional regression: navigation succeeds, only the smooth-scroll to the section is skipped. Low priority.

Contact page map iframe still centres on Mumbai — given the new SITE.address 'Gurgaon, Haryana 122004', consider updating the OpenStreetMap embed src bbox to a Gurugram-centred view for visual consistency with the published address.
No sensitive data is persisted to localStorage during form submissions — confirmed by direct Object.keys(localStorage) check (only 'lga_consent_v1' present).
Code quality: ConsentBanner dispatches a 'lga:consent' CustomEvent which is good for future analytics gating. Keep this hook in mind when wiring any future cookie/analytics integration.
seed_data_creation: Test enquiry/contact rows created with TEST_ prefix via API regression and via UI happy paths — safe to ignore or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DPDP iteration is fully green. The only minor non-blocking observation: footer-grievance-link uses URL hash #grievance, but the DOM section id is 'grievance-redressal' (data-testid='grievance-section'). Navigation works (URL contains /privacy-policy#grievance per the request spec) but in-page smooth scroll won't snap to the section. To fix, add id='grievance' (or also '#grievance') to the section element. Contact map iframe still shows Mumbai — update to Gurugram for consistency with SITE.address. Backend API contracts unchanged. No retest needed.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — feature addition, no bugs found.
